reviews.review_description:
Great sitting down game. You get money from runs, unlock and equip upgrades 1 Super, 2 Weapons, 6 Upgrades), can choose the Lucky mode to speed things up. There's multiplayer but I haven't been able to play a co-op game; seem not many people play. Pretty amazing and fun game though. A run can be around 20min to 40min long or so. 5 stages, each from a random predetermined map. You have to position yourself a bit forward/higher on the seat/couch and recenter the Quest, then move back to the original seating position to be able to properly grab the jump lever. There's also that green Super Canister on the right which I forgot about from the tutorial; the green blobs refill it. Save getting money until you get a nice multiplier for it. Lucky mode helps.

Good enough graphics, fun, there's like 7 enemy types and 1 boss on each level. There's a radar and some levers for options. 4 Weapon types? but MANY powerup vhoices.

The game is NOT nauseating, even when jumping. Turning around is smooth (kinda slow) by default.


To Developers, I recommend making the forward/backward and up/down position on the Jump Lever adjustable.

I love it, the graphics, the amount of control options you have, the sounds, and I love good clean fun! The enemies being Alien bugs! Fantastic.
I don't like that you have to pull a lever to activate the jet pack tho. Makes me avoid aerial combat tbh.
I wish picking stuff up was explained in thr tutorial, how do you get stuff from the drop box??
And why are we collecting green stuff from the bugs?

The game and design itself is pretty good but I’ve noticed that the bugs seem to be almost impossible to survive in a solo run (maybe skill issue) and not to mention that sometimes the bugs just…are dumb? Since the shielder will use his shield leaving a open gap for you to shoot from the front and the handle for the jetpack I feel like needs to be a bit further out since it’s a bit hard to grab with out hitting my thighs

Every game is different.

Eliminate those creatures, get as fast as you can to the drop to upgrade.

On your way you find extra health and coins to buy upgrades.

I have done the tutorial a few times, to get my best settings to move.
No motion sickness at all…

You can check out my gameplay from one of my first runs on my YT 

https://youtu.be/ACad4rc-G6c?si=eV5WDJ9NJWnoxj7q
It’s good

THE ALIEN INVASION DOESN'T STAND A STAND!
Create, pilot, blow up — instant fun! Multiplayer boosts the experience.
CEL-SHADING MECHA + WAVE GAMEPLAY
Big Shots put me in the driver's seat of a mecha pilot. The polished cel-shaded design, the energetic comic book vibe, and the "shoot waves + upgrades" gameplay make this title a true VR arcade experience.
You'll find yourself maneuvering the cockpit, triggering abilities, dodging, and firing — all in a fast-paced, dynamic, and immersive style.
MECHA MULTIPLAYER: GUARANTEED EXPLOSION
Co-op for up to 2 players (or more depending on the platform) adds a real social element.
The roguelite mechanics are there, and the potential is definitely there.
AlterEyes enriches the content, refines the mechanics, and adds variety.
VR MECHA: THE FUTURE OF SHOOTING
Big Shots could become a must-have for action VR fans.
In the meantime, it's already a welcome dose of adrenaline in your headset.
but very short.
This game is so fun it reminds me of an old game i used to play called Titan fall 2 it’s so fun
Its fun but nobody plays in public rooms

reviews.review_title: Good but they need to and more upgrades
reviews.review_description: They need to add a ejection seat a flamethrower and chainsaw plz add and and handguns to protect your self when you are out of your mech and then let the rocketcopter deliver a new one

reviews.review_title: Devs tried to stack too many things.
reviews.review_description:
I wanted to like this game so much because I loved the idea... 
Bug: First mission I played solo, my mech shut down and told me to wait for my team mates to revive me.... I was playing alone.
The view port  is way to small, you can see max 2 enemies, and there are usually 5-7 attacking you. 
Big Bug: Guns are cross-eyed, you literally need to cross your hands to shoot the same target with both guns...  
There are no melee or push away options,  and you are usually surrounded by 3-4 melee enemies, and you can only see 2 of them because of the small view port, and you can't hit them with both guns to kill them faster. Yes you have a radar, but you can't even catch your breath to read it, enemies are attacking you too fast, too many flashy impact animations,  your guns overheat too fast (you can't kill 2 enemies without overheating). And that is jus the first mission after the tutorial !!!
The cockpit has to many controls that could have easily been moved to buttons or options, makes both the cockpit and what's happening way too busy to enjoy.
And the jump lever... why ??? Who thought it was a good ideal to have the jump on a separate action, when the best control metod is 1 joystick going left and right and 1 to step left and right? You can either not turn when you jump or not aim...... your pick.
Solutions:
- Cross-eyed guns: use the gyroscope in the controller to track the controller's position in space, not just relative to the headset. Learn from other games.
- Jump: use X to dash an A to jump, or better yet use pressing on the joysticks to left dash right jump in the direction you choose, allowing you to focus.
- Small View Port: Increase horizontal view, apply fish eye view so you can see more, add the radar in the bottom middle portion of the view.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback! I've noted some of these points down to put on the board as actionable feedback when you sent it on discord :) We hear you on that bug as that is not meant to happen (our team is actively fixing it as we speak). For more information on our design for the mech, I recommend you read the devlog entry about how we designed the cockpit: https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/2666530/view/4133814330191081191?l=english

We could put all the controls on buttons too, but that is not the essence of BIG SHOTS. As it's a game that focusses around cockpit interactions to make you the ultimate mech pilot. Take away the cockpit interactions and widen the viewing angle and you are left with... a game where you play as the Mech, not as a cockpit controlling the mech and that is not our goal.

We hope you'll give our game another (BIG) shot with that in mind, in the mean time. We will work hard to squash that bug! :)

reviews.review_description: This game is straight gas, and is really fun. The reviews for months ago are outdated and most things complained about have been changed. Also great titanfall reference in the menu room

developer_response.body: Thank you for the awesome review @VHSsystem, hope you enjoy our upcoming update! :)

reviews.review_description: Big shots really throws you into the world of killing bugs with mechs. Moving around and shooting bugs is a must for ALL people even if you think you don’t want to. Flying around and shooting the bugs is a amazing experience you must try for your self. Five stars and a game I recommend to all people who like mechs

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome review! Nice to hear that you are you're loving the game. Keep flying and fighting!

reviews.review_title: Fry or die, shoot don't cry
reviews.review_description:
Matt games usually make me Woozy but not this one. This is really a great game. One of the best.
Mech games ever . My grandson and I had a ball co oping.. Get this one. Power ups are amazing.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the great review! We're so glad you and your grandson had a blast playing BIG SHOTS! Hearing that it stands out as one of the best mech games means a lot to us. Enjoy those upgrades and keep having fun! 🚀

reviews.review_description:
4.5 as it still needs some final touches 
Fun to do! Great intro game into VR, as it's seated, with less risk of a nephew jumping into your OLED TV. The narrow game world FOV helps against motion sickness. The cockpit looks great; I do hope they add upgrades for a bigger window in my mech later through upgrades/patches. It also needs some controller adjustments/auto-aim for things up close, as you need to cross your arms sometimes to hit things nearby. It could use some sort of pushback melee.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the awesome review! We recently update the game and added a bunch of new upgrades. Hope you have fun with those, I've also sent your suggestions to our idea board so we can check it out! :)

reviews.review_title: Trial was good I liked it
reviews.review_description: It would be better if they gave me free access

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying it out! Free access isn’t on the menu, but we promise the experience is worth it. 😎

developer_response.body: Wahahah thank you for the kind review! Awesome suggestions with them as well. I've added those to our idea board! :) Thank you for enjoying BIG SHOTS! If you got any more ideas, be sure to share them in our discord https://discord.gg/X9Y37VNPEq

We definitely want to add more weapons in a future update, I personally really like your suggestion of a drill hand haha, that sounds awesome! reviews.review_description:
This is a fun game if you're with friends. But when playing alone, the game's flaws are more apparent.

The game is a rogue lite, yet feels repetitive in a short amount of time because:
     - There are only a few unlockables (I wish you could unlock a lot more permanent upgrades like more weapons, weapon mods, skins, etc.).
     - The power up choices don't feel like choices (Power ups of greater rarity are just significantly better, yet they have less variety the rarer it is.)
     - Few Enemy Varieties and Maps

P.S. I gave the game 5 stars because it is still a fun time and I want more people to try it, but the game still needs more work before it becomes a must buy

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review @Lu_Million, we have an update scheduled on our roadmap (Overtime Update)  to tackle some of these points, if you have any suggestions for more permanent upgrades (or run upgrades) be sure to post those on our discord as we are open for fresh ideas :D.

Hopefully with the coming updates we'll be tacking more of these points but untill then, thank you for supporting BIG SHOTS! :)

Shield 
A gravity gun to smash bugs with!
Anyways,awesome game overall,would highly recommend it to quest users.

developer_response.body:
W Review, thank you!
I've added your feedback to our board, melee weapons are heavily requested so we're aware that the community really wants those added :) and a gravity gun also sounds awesome!

reviews.review_title: Not that bad, not that good, nothing new
reviews.review_description: Mothergunship mixed with mech action on a roboquest cuti graphics... but there's nothing new here, lots of jank, need polish... feels like a rush game having a hard time knowing where to go with the concept. The 3 games that games take inspiration from are so much better, making that game irrelevant. Refunding, can't even get 2hrs of d*ckin around, boring

developer_response.body: Oof, rough review haha, but thank you for the feedback! We will continue to work hard and bring more updates so we can bring you back on board someday! :)

reviews.review_description: I’ve played this game for not too long, however it’s slightly buggy at times but the devs fix it really fast. There’s a lot of cosmetics and all types of things for people to work towards and get with all types of ways to actually do so.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review @monster85325, we really appreciate that you notice our efforts to fix bugs asap, that is one of our #1 priorities. Hope you will look forward to our future updates! :)

reviews.review_description:
Fun game with a good progression system and very easy to play, being friendly to newcomers to VR. I'm happy to see that most problems that I noticed on some reviews seems to be fixed.
I hope that new weapons are underway in the roadmap.

developer_response.body: Hey Matheusspm, Thank you for taking the time in writing your review and in enjoying BIG SHOTS! Keep an eye out for our roadmap on our socials/meta news. Hopefully we can share some more news soon about our future updates! :)

reviews.review_description: Pls do something about motion sickness

developer_response.body:
Hey @The.Sniper.monkey, we have different motion settings in the mech cockpit and in our settings menu. I recommend trying them all out to see which one is the best for you.

If you tried them all out or you have suggestions for us to improve preventing motion sickness further, I recommend joining our discord! -> https://discord.gg/X9Y37VNPEq

I hope this helps! :)

reviews.review_title: Fast, Intense and fun co-op action!
reviews.review_description:
My friend and I had a ton of fun with this one! It is a rogue-lite with an interesting take: you are a powerful mech that can fly and dash around while bringing mayhem to alien hordes.

The gameplay feels great. I love the weapon feedback, and making the aliens go BOOM never gets old. I'm a simple man: I see explosions, I smile.

Highly recommend!

developer_response.body: Awesome! Thank you for the cool review, hope you keep having fun with your friend in blasting bugs 😁

reviews.review_description:
Finally! I can pilot a mech of my very own and not have to worry about motion sickness 😁 huge props to the devs for creating a fun experience with accessibility in mind. The weapons and combat feel so good!

Walking into this game as an avid enjoyer of helldivers, deep rock, robo quest, borderlands, and more, I am a huge fan of the vibes that this game is giving off. 

I am looking forward to future updates. Be sure to check out their discord. The community is very active and friendly!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words,  we're happy to see that you are enjoying it! :)

reviews.review_title: Great game with room for improvement
reviews.review_description:
Took me a couple tries to get familiar with the mechanics (needed to make adjustments for smooth turn movement), but once I got into it I was enjoying myself.

I personally like the art style of the game. I don't want all mech games to look the same.

It's a fun shooter that you can just jump into.

I think the waves of enemies needs adjustment to the pacing. It can feel like endless shooting with no breaks.

The maps could be improved a bit more for more strategic movement.

Would like to see more perk and weapon upgrades.

a PvP mode would be awesome!

Health bar gets in the way sometimes when looking/aiming down.

Would like more visibility it the cockpit - meaning I would like to see around me without having to turn.

developer_response.body: Hi there, we've recently looked into adding more grace time between waves. Adding more upgrades is our plan! :) I've passed along the other feedback to our team as they make sense to add in BIG SHOTS. Thank you for your feedback!

reviews.review_description:
One hell of a game, and so addictive! The graphics are absolutely stunning! It’s like falling into a marvel comic! The art work it’s amazing. 

Great Mechanics and story proper mech/rouge-like platformer. 

You’re going to love the mech upgrades crazy cool! 

Love it

developer_response.body: Thanks TomPlayzVR for your review! The art & design department will be very happy when I share your kind words! :)

reviews.review_title: Mechs with Friends is always better
reviews.review_description:
*Full video gameplay on my youtube channel*

Another Mech Vr game comes to the quest. This one is co-op and its more of a wave shooter roguelike. Work with your friend or solo shooting the enemies in waves to release upgrades for your mech. After so many waves you get an end level boss and you keep going as far as you can.

When you complete a level you can go back to the hub and if you have enough points can buy new weapons and upgrades for the mech before jumping in again.

The graphics are excellent and the control system works really well. Working with a friend is ithe best way tok play this. The enemies could be a bit better and the end level bos takes forver to kill and they all look very silimiar and all in pink.

But apart from those little issues its a fun mech game that you can jump back into with your new gear. Had loads of fun with ClicksterVR on this one

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you for kind words! I've passed the enemy feedback to the team :)

reviews.review_description: The game universe is very detailed. The mech is responsive, I like to dash and jump the most :) Can't wait to try out all types of weapons! Also, is very interesting how multiplayer works

developer_response.body: Awesome to hear that you are having fun with the mobility in our game, we spent a lot of time on trying to make it feel as immersive as possible, we appreciate the kind words! :)

reviews.review_description: Wow, my favorite setting and genre! The tutorial is very detailed, the mechanics are easy-to-understand and fun to play. I'm ready to complete all the missions in the game!

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing and enjoying the game! We really appreciate the positivity :)

reviews.review_description: I like the smooth controls, variety of weapons, and navigation. The games features all VR shooter capabilities. Worth playing for everyone who enjoys action games!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words! I've passed them to our team! :)

reviews.review_title: Great game, truly addictive and fun 💛
reviews.review_description: Both the graphic style and the mechanics make the gaming experience feel very rewarding and different from many other shooting games. It's a unique game that brings freshness to the library. Moreover, it fulfills the most important aspect a game should have; it's very entertaining, addictive, and you always crave for more. Absolutely recommendable. It's true that there are some things to improve, mainly more scenarios, more gaming environment variety, and these environments should be more distinct. There should also be more different types of enemies with more differentiated characteristics, not just artistically, but tactically in how they behave and how you face them. This also applies to our Mecha; it should have more different weapons that imply different styles and usage strategies, not just dealing more damage, but changing the gameplay style. The bosses are unbalanced, it's very difficult to face them, there are too many enemies, and the weapons overheat quickly. Overall, progress feels slow; you have to play a lot to get upgrades that barely feel like they make a difference, which reduces motivation to continue. But despite all of the above, it's a great game that, once polished, can be exceptional. It deserves support; if you're hesitating, it's better to buy it now. I had certain doubts before the purchase, but once you start playing, it has a charm that hooks you. You won't regret it

developer_response.body:
We really appreciate you taking the time in writing this! It's awesome to hear that you are having a lot of fun and that you even provided ideas and feedback. 

We hope to bring a lot of the things you listed in future updates and have communicated the balancing feedback to our game designers. 

If you have any more ideas or feedback or if you just want to talk about our game, be sure to join our discord: https://discord.gg/Z5nYtpDC9K

Thank you!

reviews.review_title: Who doesn't love killing alien bugs?
reviews.review_description: Killing alien bugs and monsters from inside the cockpit of a mech in VR is just so much fun!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review! :)

reviews.review_description:
Love the graphics and the controls. 

But limited weapons (Like Borderlands??).

Levelling up seems fast - level 7 after 2 failed runs.
Was expecting more than just an arena horde mode in a small area. Tutorial was more fun.

developer_response.body:
Hi Darkmesseng3r! 

Thanks for taking the time to write your review! The Like Borderlands was a joke on our part due to our artstyle being compared to it all the time but we understand the confusion! That's on us. For the point about the weapons, I can't go into too much details however, we do have some things cooking in the oven!

reviews.review_description: Sometimes you get shot through walls, terrain stops you, the aiming uses elbows in stead of wrists, and good luck aiming those grenades...but I'm still trying for a high score. 😉7

developer_response.body:
Wahahahaha, love that spirit! Keep going for the high score! The projectiles indeed currently have an issue where they go through walls, we're trying to fix that as I'm writing this.
Hope we can fix this soon! So you can increase that high score @ScoobyVR :)

reviews.review_description: Pretty cool.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review @jdib!

reviews.review_description:
Im sure somewhere this game was mentioned with the game Borderlands in a sentence... this is very inaccurate.

Experience -

Great idea, has potential but not recommended at all.

The play area is absolutely tiny, your constantly having to move, guns over heat in seconds (in a game that relies heavily on your constantly shooting) 

Yes i understand further in the random perks cam potentially help this but with what me and a friend had equipee (5 talents / mods) and then some legendary in game drops, it didnt really make any difference.

On the final wave when the boss spawns its a bit stupid, endless enemies with no rest gap in between waves so some how you need to constantly deal damage (which you cant do)
Fight a boss that spams you with damage WHILE infinite monsters are in your face attacking OR up on the highest legdes in the area firing mortars down onto your head unless your running in circles.

When a friend dies good luck getting them up as now your required to stand next to them for around 10 seconds while now every enemy zones in on you.

Unfortunately it will be refunded shortly.

developer_response.body:
Hey BeatzCreations,

Thank you for taking the time in writing your in depth review. We really appreciate it!

Since we've just released, it's really important that you as the player tell us what feels good and what doesn't. In the coming days and weeks we will spend a lot of time gathering useful feedback like this and make balancing patches to the gameplay more fun. This includes the things you described. We're currently testing out some tweaks on the Boss fights and we're testing out the revive duration.

We will work hard to keep improving BIG SHOTS!

reviews.review_description:
Great game, would 100% recommend buying it, it's an absolute banger and I wish more people would know about it to be
